title: Swyftl's Fantasy Pack
description: This project focuses on adding a fantasy setting to minecraft, giving the world new life with the Middle Earth mods, and other mods to compliment it.
body:
This pack is made to add more fantasy elements to minecraft, building off of the Middle Earth mod, and adding other things like wings, waystones and planes to get around. The Middle Earth mod is used as the core, and is then built upon using the other mods.

Enjoy exploring middle earth.
